inputs.label: Current Overtime Hours per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total overtime hours per month. Based on labor law limits (e.g., max 270 hours/year in EU).

inputs.label: Overtime Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for overtime, typically 1.5x normal rate. Based on labor contracts.

inputs.label: New Hire Monthly Salary
inputs.businessContext: Gross monthly salary for a new full-time employee. Includes base pay.

inputs.label: New Hire Productivity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Productivity of new hire relative to experienced worker. Typically 0.5-0.8 during ramp-up (Lean manufacturing).

inputs.label: Recruiting Cost per Hire
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for advertising, interviews, background checks. Based on SHRM benchmarks.

inputs.label: Training Cost per Hire
inputs.businessContext: Cost of onboarding and training. Includes trainer time, materials. Based on industry averages.

inputs.label: Monthly Productive Hours per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Standard productive hours per month (e.g., 40 hrs/week * 4 weeks).

inputs.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for overtime pay (e.g., 1.5x for time-and-a-half). Based on labor laws.

inputs.label: Employee Turnover Rate (annual)
inputs.businessContext: Annual voluntary turnover rate. Industry average 10-20% (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Overhead as percentage of direct labor cost (e.g., benefits, facilities). Typically 20-40%.

thresholds.overtimeHoursExceedLegal: currentOvertimeHoursPerMonth > 23 -> 'Monthly overtime exceeds typical legal limit of 23 hours (270/year)'
thresholds.turnoverHigh: employeeTurnoverRate > 0.2 -> 'High turnover rate increases hidden costs'

hiddenLossDrivers: if employeeTurnoverRate > 0.2 then 'High turnover increases replacement costs'
if newHireProductivityFactor < 0.6 then 'Low productivity extends ramp-up period'
suggestedActions: If annualSavingsByHiring > 0: 'Consider hiring new employees to reduce overtime costs'
If breakEvenMonths < 12: 'Hiring pays back within a year'
If overtimeHoursExceedLegal: 'Reduce overtime to avoid legal penalties'
